---
pagetitle: "Day 2 Schedule"
---

::: grid
::: {#sponsors_banner .g-col-12 .title}
# Day 1 Student Presenters
Monday, 25 May 2026 | 11:30 - 16:45 WIB  
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .full_text_block}
::: {#regular_session .g-col-12}
## Regular Session — Monday, 25 May 2026 | 11:30 - 15:00 WIB
<div id="schedule-regular"></div>
:::

::: {#iup_session .g-col-12}
## IUP Session — Monday, 25 May 2026 | 15:00 - 15:30 WIB
<div id="schedule-iup"></div>
:::

<script src="../../js/schedule.js"></script>

<script>
const SCHEDULE_REGULER = {
  startHour: 11,
  startMinute: 30,
  slotMinutes: 15,
  files: ["../../assets/reguler-senin.json"]
};

const SCHEDULE_IUP = {
  startHour: 15,
  startMinute: 0,
  slotMinutes: 15,
  files: ["../../assets/iup.json"]
};

renderSchedule("schedule-regular", SCHEDULE_REGULER);
renderSchedule("schedule-iup", SCHEDULE_IUP);
</script>

:::
:::
